title: pleurolobus heterocarpon
intro: Pleurolobus heterocarpon, also known as heterophyllous pleurolobus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to the southeastern United States. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pleurolobus heterocarpon include relieving congestion, soothing sore throats, and aiding in the relief of symptoms associated with colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Pleurolobus heterocarpon are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
